name: punchwall-motion-feedback
description: Validate Train, Punch/Reward, Shop, Pet, Rebirth, and Boss feedback remotes reach the client HUD.

args.code:
local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
local command = game:GetService("ServerStorage"):WaitForChild("PunchWallAutomation", 5)
assert(command, "missing PunchWallAutomation")
return HttpService:JSONEncode(command:Invoke("Reset"))

local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
local command = game:GetService("ServerStorage"):WaitForChild("PunchWallAutomation")
command:Invoke("Reset")
command:Invoke("SetStats", { Power = 120, Coins = 0, WallLevel = 1, CritChance = 0, FistMultiplier = 1, PetMultiplier = 0 })
return HttpService:JSONEncode(command:Invoke("BreakWall", "Brick Wall", 1))

local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
local command = game:GetService("ServerStorage"):WaitForChild("PunchWallAutomation")
command:Invoke("Reset")
command:Invoke("SetStats", { Coins = 1000, FistMultiplier = 1, BreakSpeed = 1, EquippedFist = "Starter Glove" })
return HttpService:JSONEncode(command:Invoke("BuyFist", "Boxing Glove"))

local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
local command = game:GetService("ServerStorage"):WaitForChild("PunchWallAutomation")
command:Invoke("SetStats", { Coins = 700, Luck = 1, PetMultiplier = 0, Pet = "None" })
return HttpService:JSONEncode(command:Invoke("HatchPet"))

expectRegex: "target"\s*:\s*"(Brick Pup|Miner Cat|Crystal Fox|Lava Dragon|Secret Titan Golem)"
steps.label: pet feedback received

args.code:
local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
local command = game:GetService("ServerStorage"):WaitForChild("PunchWallAutomation")
command:Invoke("SetStats", { WallLevel = 55, Coins = 1000000, Power = 250000, Rebirths = 0, FistMultiplier = 45, EquippedFist = "Titan Gauntlet" })
return HttpService:JSONEncode(command:Invoke("Rebirth"))

local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
local command = game:GetService("ServerStorage"):WaitForChild("PunchWallAutomation")
command:Invoke("SetStats", { WallLevel = 20, Coins = 0, Power = 4000000, FistMultiplier = 2, PetMultiplier = 0 })
return HttpService:JSONEncode(command:Invoke("HitBoss"))
